note: Issue/PR history from the pre-fork repository, preserved before archive deletion.

items.title: [P01] Build the frozen Control harness
items.body:
## Parent

#2

## What to build

Create an executable, immutable harness for upstream commit `83da59f`. It must run from a clean detached worktree, freeze commands/environment/retry policy, alternate paired order deterministically, and preserve raw manifests without changing the Control checkout.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] CTRL-001 passes the control-harness integrity gate.
- [ ] Dirty worktrees, changed Control files, unpinned commands, and missing provenance fail closed.
- [ ] The harness records Control commit, environment, commands, source identity, flags, retries, and raw artifacts.
- [ ] Focused and full tests pass; Sol reviews the exact staged tree.

## Blocked by

- #3

comments.body:
P01 is complete and pushed.

Evidence:
- Sol APPROVE: staged tree 
- Sol session: 
- Semantic commit: 
- Closure commit: 
- Verification: 19 focused harness tests; 146 full tests; compilation, execution registry (45 requirements / 35 packets), evidence validation, and diff checks all pass.
- Live proof: detached clean Control , real pinned tools, hash-recorded yt-dlp caption snapshots, raw output receipts, and post-run clean assertion.

The final remediation also closes the caption timing race, rejects undeclared provenance, and kills SIGTERM-resistant descendant process groups on timeout.

Correction — exact receipts (the previous comment's inline code was stripped by the shell):

- Sol-approved staged tree: 60121e1316cde582fc61f44239e87dc3a17b76e8
- Sol session: 019f54fb-63e6-7ea2-937a-45f72809a318
- Semantic commit: a97724f4c0c35ce575ba37aed21a0e7bf5adfcb1
- Closure commit: b70506b6ef49ec5e5a66c8f0d7e2b40d71e5acd7
- Frozen Control: 83da59fa78c3eee9e20f515fe75c438bb5166efd
- Verification: 19 focused tests and 146 full tests passed; compilation, registry, evidence, and diff checks passed.

items.title: v1.0 master execution tracker
items.body:
## What to build

Execute the owner-approved v1.0 master plan through the frozen Cascade/Parable protocol: Terra implements bounded packets, deterministic checks run first, and Sol independently reviews the exact staged tree before commits and pushes.

Canonical plan: `docs/plans/V1.0-MASTER-PLAN.md`
Execution chain: `docs/execution/v1/CHAIN.md`
Traceability registry: `docs/execution/v1/REQUIREMENTS.json`
Control commit: `83da59f`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Sol approves and the normative plan tree is cryptographically frozen.
- [ ] Every child packet has one owner, tests, evidence, issue, Sol verdict, and commits recorded.
- [ ] Milestones 0–7 satisfy their deterministic and measurement gates.
- [ ] Raw evidence, limitations, attribution, support matrix, tag, and release artifact verify.
- [ ] Repository visibility remains private unless the owner separately authorizes changing it.

## Blocked by

None - owner approval has been recorded; Sol plan approval is the first gate.

comments.body:
Implementation-first v1 work is assembled on `main`, and `0.3.0-rc.1` is approved for a clearly labeled early prerelease.

- Candidate: `a294534` (reviewed implementation commit `c0efe18` plus audit documentation)
- Local release audit: 327 tests passed
- Hosted CI: 5/5 macOS/Linux Python 3.11–3.14 jobs passed
- Isolated `npx skills` install/invoke/uninstall lifecycle passed
- Deterministic `watch.skill`: 81,952 bytes, SHA-256 `7636dbc7510736b2b71e3607af46ff115ff9a7d7b9eff1e0d55ea1d0e704981f`
- Independent verdict: `APPROVE_EARLY_PUBLISH`
- Evidence: `docs/evidence/v1/P32-release/RC-AUDIT.md`

The repository remains private. No tag or release was created. Stable v1.0 and broad superiority claims remain open until the multi-video Pareto benchmark, human grader validation, and one authorized sealed confirmation run are complete.

items.title: [P00] Freeze the Sol-approved execution plan
items.body:
## Parent

#2

## What to build

Close the plan-remediation loop: maintain atomic requirement coverage, machine-readable evidence schemas, deterministic measurement fixtures, complete traceability, and cryptographic integrity from Sol-reviewed tree through mechanical finalization.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] GOV-001, GOV-002, and GOV-003 pass their registry gates.
- [ ] Full tests, compilation, registry validation, evidence-schema validation, and diff checks pass.
- [ ] Sol returns APPROVE for the exact semantic tree.
- [ ] The semantic commit tree, master-plan SHA-256, and composite normative manifest are frozen.
- [ ] The mechanical finalizer changes only whitelisted registry/review/EXIT fields and `--ready` passes.

## Blocked by

None - can start immediately.

comments.body: P00 complete. Sol approved semantic tree `b280c7e82bb045101e44943135f75bb3f546aebd` in session `019f54c5-f5b9-7591-9611-4eb6ad791ade`. Finalizer commit: `15e972ef06b7ca37a531b7de964c772ba97287dd`. Verification: `127 passed`; `python3 tools/validate_v1_execution.py --ready` passes; evidence validator passes.

comments.body:
Implementation-first v1 work is assembled on `main`, and `0.3.0-rc.1` is approved for a clearly labeled early prerelease.

- Candidate: `a294534` (reviewed implementation commit `c0efe18` plus audit documentation)
- Local release audit: 327 tests passed
- Hosted CI: 5/5 macOS/Linux Python 3.11–3.14 jobs passed
- Isolated `npx skills` install/invoke/uninstall lifecycle passed
- Deterministic `watch.skill`: 81,952 bytes, SHA-256 `7636dbc7510736b2b71e3607af46ff115ff9a7d7b9eff1e0d55ea1d0e704981f`
- Independent verdict: `APPROVE_EARLY_PUBLISH`
- Evidence: `docs/evidence/v1/P32-release/RC-AUDIT.md`

The repository remains private. No tag or release was created. Stable v1.0 and broad superiority claims remain open until the multi-video Pareto benchmark, human grader validation, and one authorized sealed confirmation run are complete.
